explanation: This command simulates a typical invocation of register_app.vbs with the -register flag. It includes the full path to cscript.exe and the script, and quotes the paths to demonstrate safe insertion techniques.
This command omits quotes around the paths, relying on the absence of spaces in the file paths. It demonstrates omission as a safe mutation technique.
This command uses relative paths and omits quotes, assuming the current working directory is set appropriately. It demonstrates omission and recoding techniques.
This command uses a relative path for the script and an absolute path for the DLL, with quotes around the DLL path. It demonstrates insertion and recoding techniques.
This command adds the -nologo flag to suppress startup messages, which is a common substitution technique for cscript.exe.
